tooltip.jazzycookin.meal_hint: Eat to view nourishment, enjoyment, and mastery gain.
screen.jazzycookin.pantry_hint: Shelf-stable storage, plates, jars, and staple supply
screen.jazzycookin.fridge_hint: Chilled storage for fresh produce, dairy, proteins, and leftovers
screen.jazzycookin.freezer_hint: Deep cold storage for frozen-ready ingredients and meals
screen.jazzycookin.cellar_hint: Cool storage that slows freshness loss
message.jazzycookin.mastery: Mastery: %s total serves | This meal served %s times
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.pan_start: Tap pour to start the pan.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.pan_active: Stir for curds, fold for omelets.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.juice: Hold juice to extract liquid and pulp.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.dry: Hold dry to pull out moisture.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.prep: Start the prep step with the matched tool.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.pot: Start the cook, then let the station run.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.oven: Preheat first, then start the bake.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.preserve: Start the preserve step once setup is ready.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.rest: Start the finishing rest when the item is ready.
screen.jazzycookin.sim_hint.plate: Start plating when the serving pieces are in place.
screen.jazzycookin.action_hint.hold_mix: Hold to keep mixing every tick.
screen.jazzycookin.action_hint.hold_knea: Hold to keep kneading every tick.
screen.jazzycookin.action_hint.hold_batt: Hold to keep building the batter.
screen.jazzycookin.action_hint.hold_proc: Hold to keep pulsing the processor.
screen.jazzycookin.action_hint.tap_pour: Tap once to pour the batch into the pan.
screen.jazzycookin.action_hint.tap_remov: Tap once to remove the cooked batch.
screen.jazzycookin.action_hint.hold_stir: Hold to repeat stir every tick.
screen.jazzycookin.action_hint.hold_fold: Hold to repeat fold every tick.
